name: Orange Carmel Custard
recipeIngredient: 1 Orange, Peel and White Rind Removed
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine 1/2 cup sugar and water in a saucepan. Bring to boil and cook without stirring until the mixture is dark amber in color.
3. Pour into 6 custard cups and set aside to cool.
4. In another saucepan, slowly bring milk, cinnamon stick, and orange rind to a boil. Remove from heat and let stand for 10 minutes. Discard the cinnamon stick and orange rind.
5. Beat eggs, egg yolks, remaining 1/2 cup sugar, and orange liqueur in a bowl until well combined.
6. Whisk into the milk mixture and strain if desired.
7. Spoon into cups and cover each with a piece of foil. Place the cups in a baking pan filled with enough water to come halfway up the sides of the cups.
8. Bake for 30 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool on a rack.
9. Unmold onto dessert plates. Garnish with orange slices.
